analyst_briefing: Weekly data reveals intensified Russian hybrid tempo across FIMI, intelligence (60k officers), electoral interference (Bulgaria/Hungary), and kinetic-info coordination (2025 drone incidents), with EU countermeasures limited to sanctions on Euromore/Pravfond and EEAS reporting. No active domain scores provided; recommend holding all at neutral baselines (defence/energy/tech/trade/diplomatic: 2-3) due to unbalanced pressures lacking sustained positives. All three new incidents classify as continuations of registered Russian TTPs (high confidence actor-ttp matches). Russia shows clear increased operational tempo; US posture absent amid commitment uncertainty. Escalate to WDM/SCEM (HIGH: elections/drones), FCW/GMM (MEDIUM: FIMI/economic). No contested findings. Structural signal: Russian non-state/crypto TTP evolution demands EU offensive hybrid strategy per ECFR.
